record.text: It's a fake story to make her seem cruel. She was just stupid. The royal family didn't know how bad things were for the poor and as a way of making her seem even more out of touch and worthy of being deposed.

record.text: “I don’t support Frank Sinatra’s Fly Me To The Moon. It’s factually inaccurate. They didn’t fly to the moon. In the vacuum of space, they floated to the moon.”
also the moon is not "among the stars" in any sense that distinguishes it from earth meaningfully
Is the sun not a star?
it's not more than one star!
They sailed, yes, but they also used oars. They sailed when there was wind, and they rowed when they didn't or they were in rivers. The vikings went everywhere.
Mostly rowed through the Irish Sea to get to Dublin, which was a Norse town for centuries.

Incorrect. Dublin was a small settlement before the Vikings invaded in the 800’s and established a trading post there. After that they integrated with the locals (as they did everywhere they went) until they were defeated by Irish chieftain Brian Boru in the Battle of Clontarf in 1014.
Though there were still Norse names prominent amomg the people of Dublin much longer, at least until the time the Normans arrived.
Oh wow now i understand and it is quite an interesting story of life and time itself.
Dublin was a popular place for Vikings as it was where they sold their slaves😡
